title: echium italicum subsp. biebersteinii
intro: Echium italicum subsp. biebersteinii, also known as Purple Viper's Bugloss, is a plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Echium italicum subsp. biebersteinii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol, and are often used to treat conditions like eczema, arthritis, and respiratory issues.
